zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia Pruitt於1535年出生在英國時，她的父親William Pruitt50歲，母親Agnes41歲。她於1557年11月23日與William Rawlins在英國維爾爾維斯特波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1606年在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pruitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lanarkshire, Scotland): variant of   Prewitt  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Prewitt
meanings: English (Warwickshire): diminutive of   Prew  ,   Prue   or   Prow  .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia Pruitt was born in 1535, in England, her father, William Pruitt, was 50 and her mother, Agnes, was 41. She married William Rawlins on 23 November 1557, in Westbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1606, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia Pruitt est née en 1535, à Angleterre, son père, William Pruitt, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé William Rawlins le 23 novembre 1557, à Westbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1606, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

November 1557 in Westbury, Wiltshire, England William Rawlins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1606 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato William Rawlins il 23 novembre 1557, nel Westbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Alicia Pruittが1535年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Pruittは50歳，母Agnesは41歳であった。1557年11月23日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアウエストブリーでWilliam Rawlinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1606年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Pruitt(이)가 1535년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pruitt(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1557년 11월 23일 영국 윌츠히르 웨스트버이에서 William Rawlins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia Pruitt родилась в 1535 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William Pruitt было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Rawlins 23 ноября 1557 г. в местности вестбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1606 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
